markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review a content refresh and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** Prioritize proprietary data and unique insights to differentiate content and outrank AI-generated articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Performance Focus:** Content must drive startup leads, the primary KPI. A recent Google update has shifted SERPs, making some keywords unrankable for SEO and forcing a focus on GEO/AIO.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** Use only one internal link per target page to avoid diminishing returns (the second link is ignored).](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Brand Promotion:** Replace hard sells with soft sells (e.g., case studies, customer quotes) to improve user experience and avoid AI content penalties.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Review

  - [Reviewed a refresh of a low-CTR article to make it more LLM-friendly.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Applied Techniques:**](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Inverted pyramid structure (NYT finance reporter style).](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [Eliminated AI-generated patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Increased internal links (3 → 8).](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Added data and tables from reputable sources.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Use one link per target page. The current UI (simple underline) is a known issue outside of Jon's control.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Header Hierarchy:** Use H2s for topics that will become standalone articles to prevent keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [**Meta Description:** The current version feels AI-generated. A 2-sentence, human-written version is preferred, though Google overwrites 90% of them.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [**Proprietary Data:** Create unique content by using internal Brex data (e.g., spending stats, fee comparisons).](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will help identify data-driven article ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**SERP Differentiation:** Analyze top-ranking articles to find and fill content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Example:** Exposing hidden fees of competitors, which AI tools couldn't find.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [**Brand Promotion:** Shift from hard sells to soft sells.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves user experience and avoids AI content penalties.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [**Preferred Methods:** Case studies, customer quotes, or a dedicated Brex section before the conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

### Context: Performance & SERP Dynamics

  - [**Primary KPI:** Startup leads, not organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [**SERP Shift:** A recent Google algorithm update has heavily favored large banks, making the target keyword unrankable for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [**Result:** The article's value is now primarily for GEO (Google Explore Optimization) and AIO (AI Overview) visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Audience Definition:** The "commercial" segment (50–250 employees) is considered a startup, which impacts keyword targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Implement feedback on the refreshed article.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [Create a central repository for proprietary Brex data.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Clarify the definition of "commercial" vs. "startup" leads.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Apply the "one link per page" rule.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Suggest data-driven article ideas using Brex's internal data.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [Add "operating agreement" to the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/sBxzRpX2SyB2msWcLSYwbySjCJvdBa7j?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
